override.reason: Current validators are green and the original blocking review findings were resolved by later completed fix features in the same milestone: tracking-entry-lifecycle-coverage-fix, tracking-shell-entry-convergence-coverage-fix, tracking-timer-page-family-coverage-fix, and tracking-timer-view-local-proof-fix. The remaining failed reviews are historical mainline commits superseded by those fixes.

blockingIssues.description: The original mainline commit lacked calendar and cross-subview view-local proof for VAL-TIMER-002 and VAL-TIMER-004, but those gaps were subsequently closed by tracking-timer-page-family-coverage-fix and tracking-timer-view-local-proof-fix.
The original lifecycle mainline commit omitted the VAL-ENTRY-003 start+duration!=stop rejection case, which was subsequently closed by tracking-entry-lifecycle-coverage-fix.

appliedUpdates.description: Added explicit note that reused browser validation should bind the website runtime to 127.0.0.1:5173 so Playwright and readiness probes hit the same reachable interface.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen the review checklist so workers enumerate each fulfills/expectedBehavior bullet and confirm explicit test coverage for every documented invalid-input permutation before concluding a backend coverage feature is complete.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: tracking-entry-lifecycle-mainline claimed VAL-ENTRY-003 coverage while commit e8d0ccd only covered stop<start; the missing start+duration!=stop rejection was added later in tracking-entry-lifecycle-coverage-fix.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether mandatory agent-browser/manual verification is required for narrow Playwright assertion-fix features, because current worker practice repeatedly completes scrutiny-fix coverage with Playwright evidence only.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both tracking-shell-entry-convergence-coverage-fix and tracking-timer-page-family-coverage-fix passed code review but recorded the same procedural mismatch: SKILL.md step 9 requires agent-browser/manual verification while the workers supplied no interactiveChecks and documented no blocking reason.

rejectedObservations.observation: Update .factory/services.yaml cleanup_test_schemas to stop mentioning opentoggl_test_* schemas.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected because orphaned ephemeral schemas can still exist from interrupted runs and the existing cleanup command is additive, factual, and not contradictory to the canonical shared opentoggl_test topology documented elsewhere.

rejectedObservations.observation: Tighten frontend-test-worker guidance to require view-local evidence in every subview.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected because the current skill already contains that requirement; the issue was worker adherence in earlier commits, not missing written guidance.
